scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.start: npm run build:win-meeting-detector && npm run build:mac-meeting-detector && electron-vite preview
scripts.dev: npm run build:win-meeting-detector && npm run build:mac-meeting-detector && electron-vite dev
scripts.build: npm run generate-icons && npm run build:win-meeting-detector && npm run build:mac-meeting-detector && npm run typecheck && electron-vite build
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:win-meeting-detector && npm run build:mac-meeting-detector && electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:macos-mlx-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:mac:unsigned: npm run prepare:macos-mlx-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never --config.mac.notarize=false -c.mac.identity=null
scripts.release:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish always
scripts.release:mac: npm run prepare:macos-mlx-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.test:confirm:win: npm run test:main:run -- src/main/services/__tests__/calendar-validity.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/auto-updater.test.ts src/main/ipc/__tests__/recording-ipc.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/transcription-validity.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/crypto-validity.test.ts && npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/services/__tests__/recording-capture.test.ts
scripts.test:onboarding: npm run build && npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/components/onboarding/__tests__/TranscriptionStep.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/__tests__/Onboarding.test.tsx && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/services/__tests__/whisper-onboarding-install.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/ollama-onboarding-install.test.ts && npm run test:e2e -- e2e/onboarding-smoke.spec.ts e2e/onboarding-journey.spec.ts
scripts.test:pr:onboarding: npm run build && npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/components/onboarding/__tests__/TranscriptionStep.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/__tests__/Onboarding.test.tsx && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/services/__tests__/ollama-onboarding-install.test.ts && npm run test:e2e -- e2e/onboarding-smoke.spec.ts e2e/onboarding-journey.spec.ts
scripts.test:pr:recording: npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/App.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/EventCard.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/__tests__/RecordingBanner.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/__tests__/RecordingControls.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/Recordings.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/Upcoming.test.tsx src/renderer/src/services/__tests__/recording-capture.test.ts src/renderer/src/services/__tests__/window-detection.test.ts src/renderer/src/stores/__tests__/recording.test.ts && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/services/__tests__/recording.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/detection.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/calendar-dedupe.test.ts
scripts.test:pr:processing: npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/components/onboarding/__tests__/OllamaStep.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/onboarding/__tests__/TranscriptionStep.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/__tests__/TranscriptView.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/__tests__/TranscriptionBadge.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/MeetingDetail.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/Recordings.test.tsx && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/services/__tests__/audio-converter.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/ollama-onboarding-install.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/segmentation.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/speaker-alignment.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/startup-scan.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/transcript-guardrails.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/transcription.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/whisper-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:pr:ai: npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/components/__tests__/SpeakerLegend.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/AskAI.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/MeetingDetail.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/Search.test.tsx && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/ipc/__tests__/chat-ipc.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/llm.test.ts
scripts.test:pr:settings: npm run test:run -- src/renderer/src/App.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/PageHeader.test.tsx src/renderer/src/components/Sidebar.test.tsx src/renderer/src/pages/Settings.test.tsx && npm run test:main:run -- src/main/ipc/__tests__/prefs-ipc.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/main-window.test.ts src/main/services/__tests__/token-store.test.ts
scripts.test:pr: npm run test:pr:onboarding && npm run test:pr:recording && npm run test:pr:processing && npm run test:pr:ai && npm run test:pr:settings
